label: Rule pack
description: Grammar rule pack used for names, art descriptions, battle logs, events, and generated text.

include.label: Include
include.description: Other RulePackDefs whose resolved rules are merged into this pack at runtime.

rulePack.label: Rule pack
rulePack.description: The grammar rule data for this def, containing inline string rules, file references, and raw rule objects.

directTestable.label: Direct testable
directTestable.description: Whether this rule pack can be directly tested in the grammar tester tool.
